Class StorageExtensions

Extension methods on MultitenancyBuilder for registering tenant storage providers.

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

WithAzureBlobStorage(MultitenancyBuilder)

Registers the Azure Blob ITenantStorageProvider. Requires a BlobContainerClient to be registered separately.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithAzureBlobStorage(this MultitenancyBuilder builder)
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

WithLocalStorage(MultitenancyBuilder, string)

Registers a local disk ITenantStorageProvider for development.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithLocalStorage(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, string basePath = "./tenant-storage")
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder

The multitenancy builder.
string basePath

Root directory for local storage. Defaults to ./tenant-storage.
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

WithS3Storage(MultitenancyBuilder, string)

Registers the AWS S3 ITenantStorageProvider. Requires AWSSDK.S3 to be configured in your service container.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithS3Storage(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, string bucketName)
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder

The multitenancy builder.
string bucketName

The S3 bucket name.
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
| Edit this page View Source

WithTenantStorage(MultitenancyBuilder, StorageProvider)

Registers a storage provider by enum value. For S3/Azure, use the typed overloads for full configuration control.

Declaration
public static MultitenancyBuilder WithTenantStorage(this MultitenancyBuilder builder, StorageProvider provider)
Parameters
Type Name Description
MultitenancyBuilder builder
StorageProvider provider
Returns
Type Description
MultitenancyBuilder
